element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Establishes baseline basketball mechanics; centers meet at court center per traditional rules
Foundational player actions; dribble button + joystick direction required for movement with ball
Learning differences between players becomes critical for jump shots, dunks, and rebounds

element_introduction_order.first_appears: When in lane moving toward basket with shoot button
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Timing-based button release at apex of jump; failure results in high rim bounce
Button rebinding on defense; steal requires directional movement + button; risk of fouling

element_introduction_order.first_appears: After defensive foul or opponent foul
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: 5-second timer; descending ring must align with basket; penalty possession loss
Position under ball shadow; press shoot button; critical for later game stages
Game difficulty increases with gameplay duration; points needed to earn additional minute of play

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Arcade sports action with escalating pressure; tight 1-minute play intervals punctuated by cinematic dunk sequences; difficulty continuously increases; time-based tension primary driver

difficulty_curve.early_game: Lenient scoring threshold; computer opponent provides baseline challenge; 1-minute initial credit
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Scoring requirements tighten; computer team adapts with better defense and offensive pressure
difficulty_curve.late_game: Significant difficulty spike; longer gameplay with aggressive opponent AI; character movement mastery essential
notable_spikes: Late-game compound difficulty: faster opponent + higher scoring demands

notable_level_patterns.description: Each 1-minute interval acts as a skill gate; earning additional time requires outscoring computer team; creates punctuated difficulty escalation
Camera focus shift to character attempting dunk when in lane with shoot button pressed; gameplay rhythm broken by presentation; timing-critical release mechanic
Five opposing players line up; isolated 5-second challenge with descending ring mechanic; spatially simplified from court action
